title: 1pcs Plastic Nylon Fine Mesh Strainer, 200 Mesh PP Non Slip Handle for Coffee, Jam, Fruits, Vegetable Straining Set
features: Package Include:You will get 1 pieces of long handle plastic nylon mesh strainers,200 mesh strainer is ultra-fine to filter Juice Food and so on ,the filtering function is very powerful and they are very easy cleaning.

Convenient Design:The color of this nylon mesh strainer bag with handle is white, it is suitable for kitchens with different styles; The filter has a non-slip handle, it is convenient and comfortable for you to hold, and there is a hole in the handle, you can hang it on the wall or cabinet easily to save space.

Appropriate Size:Inner circle diameter: 11cm/4.33inch；outer diameter: 14.5cm/5.71inch；handle length: 9.5cm/3.74inch Overall length: 24cm/9.4inch. our strainer is hygienic and built to last, no scratch and not easy to fade, available for long time use
Handle Design: The wave pattern design of the handle can effectively prevent slipping, and the plastic handle has the effect of heat insulation.

Multipurpose Applications: you can prepare the suitable cup of tea with our quality fine mesh strainer, just strain the grains to create a delicious tea and infusion without bits, the practical strainer tool could be applied for loose tea leaves, cocktail and pulp, coffee grounds, wheat flour and more
description: Specifications: Color: white Mesh: nylon Size: Inner circle diameter: 11cm/4.33inch Outer circle diameter: 14.5cm/5.71inch Handle length: 9.5cm/3.74inch Full length: 24cm/9.4inch Package includes: 1 x Nylon mesh strainers（200 mesh) Easy to wash: The kitchen mesh filter is easy to clean, the nylon mesh can be turned up and down, you just need to clean the food residues on the nylon mesh with cold water or hot water directly, and then dry it and you can continue to use it. Nice tools for kitchen: These fine nylon mesh filters with handles can be applied for sifting, draining, straining and sieving foods and ingredients before cooking and baking, bring you a pleasant cooking experience.
